content: Hon’ble Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee extended her hearty congratulations and appreciation to all Marwari and Rajasthani people living in West Bengal on the occasion of Rajasthan Diwas.
title: Hon’ble Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee extended her hearty congratulations and appreciation to all Marwari and Rajasthani people living in West Bengal on the occasion of Rajasthan Diwas.

content: Hon'ble Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee extended her greetings to all on the auspicious occasion of Mahavir Jayanti.
title: Hon'ble Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee extended her greetings to all on the auspicious occasion of Mahavir Jayanti.
